Experience the Best in Trinidad and Tobago Wedding Photography

Hi, I’m Yaisa Tangwell, a passionate Wedding Photographer based in Trinidad and Tobago. 

With over 16 years of experience as a Wedding Photographer in Trinidad, I capture the most intimate and joyful moments of couples on their special day. 

From Cozy Elopements to Extravagant Affairs.

Wedding cinema
Come away with me to the four seasons, anguilla

Photography Packages we offer

Real Memories Captured

Weddings

Based in Trinidad and Tobago, our wedding photography service is not just about capturing smiles; it's about crafting a visual symphony of your unique love story.

Click to see more

Cinema

Lights, camera, forever—let's turn your wedding into a cinematic masterpiece!

click to see more

Maternity

Cherish the beauty of this special journey as we create timeless images that celebrate the anticipation, joy, and love that come with expecting a new life.

Contact us

Pre Wedding

Our Engagement Shoots are all about capturing the joy, the giggles, and the sweet moments that make your love story uniquely yours!

Contact us

Anniversary

Celebrate another chapter of your love story with our Anniversary Shoots, a love that only gets better with time!

Contact us

Family Portraits

Gather your squad, strike a pose, and let's capture the joyous chaos of your tribe with our Family Shoots

Contact us

Wedding Photographer Trinidad and Tobago

Get in touch
  • Blog
  • About
  • Wedding
  • Cinematography

Specializing in wedding photography across Trinidad and Tobago, Yaisa Tangwell captures timeless moments for weddings, couples, and families. With a focus on creativity, professionalism, and personalized service, Yaisa delivers stunning imagery that tells your unique story. Offering wedding, portrait, and event photography tailored to your needs. Let’s create memories to last a lifetime.
